personalInfo.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
personalInfo.bio: Specialized in complex frontend engineering with deep technical expertise. Full production experience in rare domains including medical visualization (cephalometric analysis / 3D dental models), AI Agent engineering, and micro-frontend architecture. Capable of independently delivering complete solutions from technical design to full-stack deployment.

highlights.title: Technical Depth
highlights.description: Full production experience in rare domains including medical visualization, AI Agent engineering, and micro-frontend architecture — beyond typical CRUD development

highlights.title: Independent Delivery
highlights.description: Capable of independently delivering complete solutions from technical design to full-stack deployment. The Meituan intelligent ops alerting system (frontend + backend) was delivered solo

highlights.title: Team Lead Experience
highlights.description: Served as Frontend Tech Lead at Yayan for 2 years, driving micro-frontend refactoring, establishing CI/CD pipelines, and improving team iteration efficiency by 3x

highlights.title: AI Engineering
highlights.description: Production deployment of LangChain / MCP / Function Calling / SSE. Experience with Prompt engineering standards and data pipeline construction

highlights: Led HarmonyOS adaptation of core Meituan / Dianping hotel & travel H5 components, encapsulating platform abstraction layer to handle API parameter mapping and tracking SDK compatibility, ensuring zero-disruption launch on HarmonyOS

Independently delivered full-stack intelligent ops alerting system (Koa.js + React): built multi-tool Agent with LangChain + Function Calling, reducing manual investigation time from 15 minutes to under 2 minutes
Implemented AI streaming output with SSE and word-by-word rendering; used MCP protocol to unify multi-model context management with multi-turn tool call chains
Contributed to AI platform data pipeline: established Prompt engineering standards, improving structured JSON output parsing success rate to over 97%

projects.name: Dental Medical Intelligence Platform
highlights: Led full-cycle development of medical case workflow pages, independently responsible for complete delivery from requirements to production
Designed and implemented linked-list form rendering solution, reducing form module iteration cycle by ~40%
Implemented role-based permission control for dental chart components using strategy pattern, supporting three distinct permission systems for doctors, technicians, and administrators

projects.name: Cephalometric Analysis System & Dental 3D Model System
highlights: Built cephalometric analysis engine with react-konva: supports 20+ measurement types including point dragging, Bezier curves, angle and distance measurement
Abstracted diverse measurement calculations into composable math tool chains via strategy pattern, near-zero extension cost
Solved Three.js inability to load medical .vtp format, enabling precise zone coloring and lasso selection on dental models

projects.name: Longmao Campus Fitness Assessment Platform (SaaS)
highlights: Led micro-frontend refactoring with qiankun: decomposed tightly-coupled SaaS monolith into independent sub-applications, reducing new feature release cycle from 2 weeks to 3 days
Extracted shared utilities and components into private npm packages, eliminating ~30% duplicate code

projects.name: Intelligent Ops Alerting System
projects.description: Multi-tool AI Agent system built with LangChain + Function Calling, reducing manual investigation time from 15 minutes to under 2 minutes.
highlights: Multi-tool Agent for automated alert root cause analysis and remediation suggestions
SSE streaming output + MCP protocol for unified multi-model context management
Solo full-stack delivery: frontend (React) + backend (Koa.js)

projects.name: Cephalometric Analysis System
projects.description: Dental cephalometric analysis engine built with react-konva, supporting 20+ measurement types and resolving coordinate drift during zoom.
highlights: Group-level hierarchy decouples image coordinate system from measurement logic
Strategy pattern abstracts measurements into composable math tool chains
Supports point dragging, Bezier curves, angle and distance measurement

projects.name: Dental 3D Model System
projects.description: Solved Three.js inability to load medical .vtp format, enabling precise zone coloring and lasso selection on dental models.
highlights: vtk.js parses polygon mesh and converts to BufferGeometry
Raycaster triangle intersection for precise zone detection
Filled team's technical gap in medical 3D visualization

projects.name: Dental Medical Intelligence Platform
projects.description: Full-cycle medical case workflow platform with linked-list form rendering, reducing iteration cycle by ~40%.
highlights: Linked-list forms: each node only aware of predecessor condition, zero-intrusion extension
Strategy pattern for three-role differentiated permission control
Solo delivery from requirements to production

projects.name: Longmao Campus Fitness Platform
projects.description: Led micro-frontend refactoring with qiankun, decomposing SaaS monolith into independent sub-applications, reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to 3 days.
highlights: qiankun micro-frontend: independent deployment and iteration per sub-app
Extracted shared utilities into private npm packages, eliminating 30% duplicate code
Led team to improve iteration efficiency by 3x

projects.name: HarmonyOS H5 Adaptation
projects.description: HarmonyOS adaptation of Meituan / Dianping hotel & travel H5 core components, ensuring zero-disruption business launch.
highlights: Platform abstraction layer for unified API parameter mapping
Tracking SDK HarmonyOS compatibility solution
Zero-disruption business launch on HarmonyOS
